items.situation: two friends sharing cooking tips while grocery shopping

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Are you grabbing tomatoes for that pasta sauce you keep raving about? Mine never tastes right.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, but honestly the trick isn't the tomatoes. It's adding a pinch of sugar at the end to cut the acidity.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sugar? Huh, I always thought you had to simmer it for hours.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It helps, but the sugar does most of the work. Oh, and grab the canned ones, not fresh. They're riper.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wait, canned are actually better? That feels backwards.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: For sauce, totally. They're picked at peak ripeness. I'll text you the recipe with the amounts.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That'd be perfect. I'm definitely making this tonight.

questions.stem: What are the speakers mainly discussing?

options.A: How to improve the woman's homemade pasta sauce.
options.B: Which grocery store has the freshest vegetables.
options.C: Why the man stopped cooking pasta at home.
options.D: How long it takes to simmer a tomato sauce.

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：对话核心是男生向女生分享让番茄酱更好吃的技巧（加糖、用罐装番茄），帮助她改进做不好的酱料。B选项错误，对话没有比较哪家超市蔬菜更新鲜。C选项错误，男生并没有停止在家做意面，反而在分享自己的做法。D选项错误，炖煮时间只是对话中的一个小细节，不是主旨。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do later?

options.A: Simmer her sauce for several hours as usual.
options.B: Ask the man to cook the pasta sauce for her.
options.C: Try making the sauce with canned tomatoes and sugar.
options.D: Switch to buying only fresh tomatoes from now on.

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：女生说她今晚一定要做（I'm definitely making this tonight），并接受了男生关于用罐装番茄和加糖的建议，所以她最可能按新方法尝试。A选项错误，男生说糖才是关键，长时间炖煮不是重点，女生也不再坚持老办法。B选项错误，对话没有提到让男生替她做。D选项错误，男生建议做酱时用罐装而非新鲜番茄，所以只买新鲜番茄与对话相反。

items.situation: two students swapping music recommendations because one is bored of the same pop singers

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Honestly, I'm so bored of my playlist. It's the same three pop singers on repeat.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, you should check out this jazz trio I've been into. They're super relaxing for studying.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Jazz? I've never really listened to it. Isn't it kind of old-fashioned?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not these guys. They mix in electronic beats, so it feels modern. I'll send you their album link.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Okay, that actually sounds cool. Send it over.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Done. Start with the third track. It's the one that got me hooked.

questions.stem: What kind of music does the man recommend?

options.B: A jazz trio with electronic beats.
options.C: The same pop singers she already likes.

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：男生说他推荐的是一个融合电子节拍的爵士三重奏（this jazz trio... they mix in electronic beats）。A选项错误，对话没有提到古典钢琴。C选项错误，那些流行歌手正是女生听腻了的，不是男生的推荐。D选项错误，男生特意强调这些音乐不是老派的，所以老式大乐队摇摆乐与对话相反。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Delete all the pop songs from her playlist.
options.B: Ask the man to make her a new playlist.
options.C: Go to a live jazz concert with the man.
options.D: Listen to the album the man sent her.

questions.explanation: 正确答案D：女生说听起来很酷、让男生发过来（that actually sounds cool. Send it over），男生发了专辑链接并建议先听第三首，所以她最可能去听这张专辑。A选项错误，她只是听腻了，没说要删掉流行歌曲。B选项错误，男生只是发链接，没说要替她做歌单。C选项错误，对话没有提到去看现场演出。

items.situation: two roommates working out a fair quiet-hours schedule

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Can we talk about quiet hours? I've got an early biology lab, so I really need to sleep by eleven.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, no worries. The thing is, I usually do my gaming calls late at night. How about I just use headphones after ten?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That would help a ton, actually.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: And you can have the room to yourself in the early mornings since I sleep in. Fair trade?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Totally fair. Should we write it down so we don't forget?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good idea. I'll stick a note on the fridge with the agreement.

questions.stem: Why does the woman start the conversation?

options.A: To complain that the man games too much.
options.B: To ask the man to switch dorm rooms with her.
options.C: To set up a quiet-hours arrangement with her roommate.
options.D: To borrow the man's headphones for her lab.

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：女生开口是想商量安静时段（Can we talk about quiet hours?），因为她有早课需要早睡，最终两人达成了协议。A选项错误，她没有抱怨男生玩游戏太多，而是友好地协商。B选项错误，对话没有提到换宿舍。D选项错误，是男生提出自己戴耳机，女生并不是来借耳机的。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do at night from now on?

options.A: Wear headphones during his late gaming calls.
options.C: Move his gaming to the dorm common room.
options.D: Wake up early to game in the mornings.

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：男生提议十点后自己戴耳机（I just use headphones after ten），女生表示这很有帮助，所以他晚上打游戏时最可能戴耳机。B选项错误，他没说要完全停止打游戏，只是戴耳机。C选项错误，对话没有提到去公共休息室。D选项错误，男生说自己会睡懒觉，把清晨留给女生，并非早起打游戏。

items.situation: two friends planning a birthday surprise for a classmate

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: So Daniel's birthday is Friday. I was thinking we surprise him after his afternoon seminar.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Love it. Should we do it in the lounge? There's space for everyone there.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll handle the decorations and the cake.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Great. Then I'll text the rest of the group so everyone knows to hide by four.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, and let's keep it quiet around him. He has no idea, right?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: None at all. I'll message everyone the second I leave here.

questions.stem: Where will the surprise party take place?
questions.explanation: 正确答案D：男生提议在休息室办（Should we do it in the lounge?），女生回答很好，所以惊喜派对会在学生休息室举行。A选项错误，对话只提到在他研讨课后给他惊喜，地点是休息室，不是教室门外。B选项错误，对话没有提到咖啡馆。C选项错误，对话没有提到在宿舍。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do after the conversation?

options.B: Message the group about hiding by four.
options.C: Tell Daniel about the surprise party.
options.D: Decorate the lounge for the party.

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：男生说他一离开就给大家发消息（I'll message everyone the second I leave here），要通知大家四点前藏好，所以他最可能去给小组发消息。A选项错误，女生说蛋糕由她负责。C选项错误，他们想保密，男生说Daniel完全不知情，不会告诉他。D选项错误，布置和蛋糕都由女生负责。

items.situation: two friends discussing a movie one just saw — good twists but too long

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I finally saw that detective movie everyone's talking about. The twist at the end completely fooled me.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh nice, so you'd recommend it? I've been on the fence.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Mostly, yeah. My only complaint is that it drags in the middle. It's almost three hours long.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Three hours? Yikes. That's a big commitment for a weeknight.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Right. If you go, save it for the weekend when you're not tired.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Good call. I'll plan to catch it Saturday afternoon then.

questions.stem: What complaint does the woman have about the movie?

options.A: It is too long and drags in the middle.
options.B: The ending twist was easy to predict.
options.C: The detective plot was hard to follow.

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：女生说她唯一的不满是中段拖沓、电影近三个小时长（My only complaint is that it drags in the middle. It's almost three hours long），所以她唯一的不满是电影太长、中段拖沓。B选项错误，她说结局的反转把她完全骗到了，所以反转并不容易猜。C选项错误，对话没有说剧情难懂。D选项错误，对话没有提到票价。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?

options.A: Skip the movie because it is too long.
options.B: Watch the movie on a weeknight after class.
options.C: See the movie on Saturday afternoon.
options.D: Wait for the movie to come out online.

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：男生说他打算周六下午去看（I'll plan to catch it Saturday afternoon then），采纳了女生周末看的建议，所以他最可能周六下午去看。A选项错误，他没有放弃，而是打算周末去看。B选项错误，女生建议别在疲惫的工作日晚上看，男生也同意周末看，所以工作日晚上被否决了。D选项错误，对话没有提到等线上版本。
